title: gymnocalycium neuhuberi
intro: Gymnocalycium neuhuberi, also known as Neuhuber's Ball Cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Gymnocalycium, characterized by its small, globular stems and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Gymnocalycium neuhuberi has been associated with several health benefits, such as improved digestion, reduced fever, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and powdered to be used as a natural remedy in teas, capsules, or tinctures, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment require further scientific research.
